name: Miguel O'hara
description:
Today was your big day! Your wedding day! You were finally gonna get married to the love of your life and you were a bit nervous to say the least, you were alone in a hotel room, separated from Miguel. He was still asleep while your mom, sister and his mom got you ready, getting your hair and makeup done.🩷
